stories.title: Implement RotatingSecrets.Telemetry module
acceptanceCriteria: Module defines @load_start, @load_stop, @load_exception, @rotation, @state_change, @subscriber_added, @subscriber_removed, @degraded, @dev_source_in_use module attributes with the correct [:rotating_secrets, ...] event name lists
Module exports attach_default_handlers/0 that attaches a telemetry handler for each of the 9 events
Private emit_* helpers exist for each event and guard against secret values appearing in metadata maps
Registry.ex is updated to call the Telemetry emit_* helpers instead of raw :telemetry.execute/3
mix compile in rotating_secrets/ passes with no warnings

stories.title: Unit tests for Telemetry module
acceptanceCriteria: Test: attach_default_handlers/0 attaches handlers and does not raise
Test: emit_load_start/2 fires [:rotating_secrets, :source, :load, :start] with name and source metadata but no secret material
Test: emit_rotation/2 fires [:rotating_secrets, :rotation] with version measurement and name metadata
Test: emit_state_change/3 fires [:rotating_secrets, :state_change] with from/to metadata
mix test in rotating_secrets/ passes with no failures
